setting: 深夜、疲れ切って親友にSOSを出すチャット
lyrics:
I might lose my mind
Waking when the sun's down
Riding all these highs
Waiting for the comedown
Walk these streets with me
I'm doing decently
Just glad that I can breathe, yeah

I'm trying to realize
It's alright to not be fine on your own

Now I'm shaking, drinking all this coffee
These last few weeks have been exhausting
I'm lost in my imagination
And there's one thing that I need from you

Can you come through, through
Through, yeah
And there's one thing that I need from you
Can you come through?

Ain't got much to do
Too old for my hometown
Went to bed at noon
Couldn't put my phone down
Scrolling patiently
It's all the same to me
Just faces on a screen, yeah

I'm trying to realize
It's alright to not be fine on your own

Now I'm shaking, drinking all this coffee
These last few weeks have been exhausting
I'm lost in my imagination
And there's one thing that I need from you

Can you come through, through
Through, yeah
And there's one thing that I need from you
Can you come through, through
Through, yeah
And there's one thing that I need from you
Can you come through?

lyricsJa.ja: おかしくなっちゃいそうだよ
日が落ちてから目が覚めるような生活
ハイテンションで突っ走っては
反動で落ち込むのをビクビク待ってるんだ
この街を一緒に歩いてよ
僕もそれなりに上手くやってるから

lyricsJa.en: Just glad that I can breathe, yeah
lyricsJa.ja: ただ普通に息ができているだけで、今は嬉しいんだよ
最近、気づこうとしてるんだ

lyricsJa.en: It's alright to not be fine on your own
lyricsJa.ja: 一人で抱え込まずに、「今は大丈夫じゃない」って言っても良いんだってね

lyricsJa.en: Now I'm shaking, drinking all this coffee
lyricsJa.ja: コーヒーの飲みすぎで手が震えてるよ

lyricsJa.en: These last few weeks have been exhausting
lyricsJa.ja: ここ数週間は本当に疲れ切ってた
ずっと頭の中の妄想に迷い込んでいるけど

lyricsJa.en: And there's one thing that I need from you
lyricsJa.ja: 君に一つだけ、お願いしたいことがあるんだ
ちょっと、うちに来てくれない？
顔を出してほしいんだ

lyricsJa.en: And there's one thing that I need from you
lyricsJa.ja: 君にお願いしたいのは一つだけ
ちょっと、うちに来てくれない？
特にやることもないし
地元でつるむにはもう歳をとりすぎた
お昼にベッドに入ったのに
スマホが手放せなかった
ただ延々と画面をスクロールして

lyricsJa.en: It's all the same to me
lyricsJa.ja: でもどれを見ても同じに思えるよ

lyricsJa.en: Just faces on a screen, yeah
lyricsJa.ja: 画面の中に並んだ顔たちにすぎないんだ
最近、気づこうとしてるんだ

lyricsJa.en: It's alright to not be fine on your own
lyricsJa.ja: 一人で抱え込まずに、「今は大丈夫じゃない」って言っても良いんだってね

lyricsJa.en: Now I'm shaking, drinking all this coffee
lyricsJa.ja: コーヒーの飲みすぎで手が震えてるよ

lyricsJa.en: These last few weeks have been exhausting
lyricsJa.ja: ここ数週間は本当に疲れ切ってた
ずっと頭の中の妄想に迷い込んでいるけど

lyricsJa.en: And there's one thing that I need from you
lyricsJa.ja: 君に一つだけ、お願いしたいことがあるんだ
ちょっと、うちに来てくれない？
顔を出してほしいんだ

lyricsJa.en: And there's one thing that I need from you
lyricsJa.ja: 君にお願いしたいのは一つだけ
ちょっと、うちに来てくれない？
ちょっと顔を出してほしいんだ

lyricsJa.en: And there's one thing that I need from you
lyricsJa.ja: 君におねがいしたいのは一つだけ
ねえ、ちょっとうちに来てくれない？

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: I feel like I might lose my mind tonight.
sentences.displayHtml: I feel like I might lose my mind tonight.

conversation.japanese: ねえ、起きてる？今夜はなんだかおかしくなっちゃいそうだよ。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: You've been working too hard lately.
sentences.displayHtml: You've been working too hard lately.

conversation.japanese: 起きてるよ。どうしたの？最近働きすぎなんじゃない？

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: These last few weeks have been so exhausting.
sentences.displayHtml: These last few weeks have been so exhausting.

sentences.text: And now I'm shaking, drinking all this coffee.
sentences.displayHtml: And now I'm shaking, drinking all this coffee.

conversation.japanese: ここ数週間、本当に疲れきっててさ。コーヒーの飲み過ぎで、今は手が震えてるんだ。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: Have you been scrolling through social media again?
sentences.displayHtml: Have you been scrolling through social media again?

conversation.japanese: デジタルデトックスしなよ。またSNSばっかり見てたの？

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: Yeah, I couldn't put my phone down.
sentences.displayHtml: Yeah, I couldn't put my phone down.

sentences.text: Everyone just looks like faces on a screen.
sentences.displayHtml: Everyone just looks like faces on a screen.

conversation.japanese: うん、スマホが手放せなかった。みんな、ただの画面の中の顔にしか見えなくて。憂鬱だよ。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: Sometimes you just need real company.
sentences.displayHtml: Sometimes you just need real company.

conversation.japanese: 分かるよ。たまには画面越しじゃない、現実の話し相手が必要だよね。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: I'm trying to realize it's alright to not be fine on your own.
sentences.displayHtml: I'm trying to realize it's alright to not be fine on your own.

conversation.japanese: 一人で抱え込まずに「大丈夫じゃない」って言って良いんだって気づこうとしてる。だから…ちょっとうちに来てくれない？

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: I'll bring some decaf tea and be there in ten.
sentences.displayHtml: I'll bring some decaf tea and be there in ten.

conversation.japanese: それ以上言わなくていいよ。カフェインレスのお茶を持って、10分で行くね。
